title: lindsaea chrysolepis
intro: Lindsaea chrysolepis, also known as Gold Fern, is a species of fern native to Australia. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lindsaea chrysolepis include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lindsaea chrysolepis may include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to promote wound healing and reduce pain.
